NORTHMAN-RAGE.description: The red effect will not trigger when the card is played, but instead get added to the [color=red]Rage Queue[/color].
NORTHMAN-RAGE.title: Rage
NORTHMAN-INVOKE.description: The next card in the [color=red]Rage Queue[/color] triggers X additional times.
NORTHMAN-INVOKE.title: Invoke X
NORTHMAN-ANGER.description: This card generates (or diminishes) [color=red]Anger[/color]. When you reach 5 [color=red]Anger[/color], the [color=red]Rage Queue[/color] triggers.
NORTHMAN-ANGER.title: Anger
